name: Shandong Xinchao Energy Corporation Limited
summary: Shandong Xinchao Energy Corporation Limited engages in the exploration, production, and sale of oil and natural gas. The company was formerly known as Yantai Xinchao Industry Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shandong Xinchao Energy Corporation Limited in June 2016. Shandong Xinchao Energy Corporation Limited was founded in 1985 and is based in Yantai, China.
